summary: The diff modifies AdminPage.tsx and useQueries.ts to remove authentication gates and implement anonymous actor-based data fetching. AdminPage.tsx appears to have no auth imports or conditional rendering based on auth state, and shows loading/error/empty states. The useQueries.ts hook is described as using anonymous fetching. Both REQ-23 and REQ-24 appear largely implemented, though the diff is truncated and some details cannot be fully verified.
